title: Buttery Croissant Suets
description: A rich and flaky pastry filled with melted suet and a hint of buttery goodness.
instructions: Thaw the croissant dough according to package instructions.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Melt the suet in a saucepan over low heat.
Brush the melted suet over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Cut the dough into desired shapes.
Place the shapes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and brush with melted butter.
